title: Procedure runtime PID tracking + stale detection

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing Procedure PID ownership metadata + stale liveness detection in run/status paths.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented PID liveness stale detection in stale_timeout: runtime.pid/host now probed with os.kill(pid,0); dead local PID marks Procedure+Task+stages STALLED immediately with kind=process_dead and explicit message. Added tests; stale-timeout suite passing (7/7).
